narrative:
Pickerington Local Sd (Fairfield) school district has 40,513 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.0% D−R vs -8.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
